configurePresets.name: dev
configurePresets.description: Default developer configuration. Keeps the CUDA backend disabled unless explicitly requested.

configurePresets.name: dev-cuda
configurePresets.description: Developer configuration with the optional CUDA backend enabled. Requires a working CUDA toolkit/driver install.

configurePresets.name: ci
configurePresets.description: Smaller headless-friendly configure preset for CI or focused test runs.

configurePresets.name: ci-vulkan
configurePresets.displayName: Debug tests + sandbox + promoted Vulkan (CUDA off)
configurePresets.description: CI preset that opts in to the promoted Vulkan backend (INTRINSIC_RUNTIME_ENABLE_PROMOTED_VULKAN=ON) and includes the Sandbox target for end-to-end visible-triangle smoke. Runtime still falls back to Null per the GRAPHICS-033 truth table when the operational gate is not satisfied; gpu;vulkan fixtures opt in via 'ctest -L gpu -L vulkan'.
